summary: Comprehensive testing of TruDerm website with new Reviews page functionality completed successfully. All 46 real Google reviews implemented correctly with search and filtering. Homepage testimonials updated with real patient reviews. Navigation and appointment booking working perfectly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all sections and white+gold theme
Testimonials section shows 4 real Google reviews (Anjali Chakravarty, Aditi Shukla, Shruti Choudhary, Manav Mathur)
'Read All 896+ Patient Reviews' button navigates to /reviews successfully
/reviews page loads with 46 reviews displayed correctly
Reviews page search functionality filters reviews by keyword
Category filter buttons work (Acne: 9 reviews, Hair: 9 reviews, All filters functional)
Reviews page 'Back to Home' link navigates to homepage
Reviews page stats bar shows 4.9 rating, 896+ reviews, 9+ years
'View on Google Maps' button exists at bottom of reviews page
Book Appointment modal works from navbar on reviews page
POST /api/appointments endpoint works correctly (5/5 backend tests passed)
Navbar navigation works from /reviews page back to homepage sections
Direct URL access to /reviews page works
React Router navigation working between homepage and reviews
All review filter categories functional (All, Acne, Hair, Laser, Pigmentation, Facial, Eczema/Psoriasis, General)
Search functionality filters by patient name, treatment type, and review content
CORS headers and API integration working
